message:
fix(done): auto-commit uncommitted work as safety net (gt-pvx) (#3172)

Auto-commits uncommitted polecat implementation work during gt done to
prevent data loss. Adds sync guard to skip worktree branch switch when
uncommitted changes remain (if auto-commit fails).

Closes #3172

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
